  "text": "The CockroachDB Raft consensus integration and range lease management spans the following key files and components in pkg/kv/kvserver/:\n\n## Raft Ready Processing\n\n**pkg/kv/kvserver/store_raft.go**: Contains `Store.processReady` (line 671) which is the entry point for batch Raft processing of a single range.
